response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song from 00:00-00:18 as 'あいうえおんがく' by GReeeeN based on visual text. 2. Performed a search for 'あいうえおんがく GReeeeN lyrics' to get official lyrics. 3. Confirmed no vocal music in the remainder of the video, which is a montage of fan art and messages followed by sponsor slides. 4. Created scene objects and mapped timestamps accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a montage of various people dancing to the song 'あいうえおんがく' by GReeeeN. This is followed by a lengthy collage of fan art and messages congratulating the 3rd generation of hololive on their 3rd anniversary. The video concludes with a promotional image for a concert and a sponsor slide.

scenes.description: A montage of different people dancing to the song 'あいうえおんがく' by GReeeeN. The lyrics of the song are heard.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A, I, U, E, O, Ka, Ki, Ku, Ke, Ko
Sa, Shi, Su, Se, So, Ta, Chi, Tsu, Te, To
Na, Ni, Nu, Ne, No, Ha, Hi, Fu, He, Ho
Ma, Mi, Mu, Me, Mo, Ya, Yu, Yo
Ra, Ri, Ru, Re, Ro, Wa, Wo, N
And the "ten" and "maru" too.
It's mysterious, it's strange, right? Combining "a" to "n".
Putting it into mouths, putting it into letters, what should we talk about today?
The things happening at the end of the world, or even what we're having for dinner today.
Let's talk to share our tears and laughter.
It's decided, this hatred, I like that, don't you see?
That's for myself, so you'll be able to smash it, right?
Look, words are wrapped around us after all.
There's something I want to talk to you about.
When I think about it, I'm thrilled.
With or without you nearby, these are such wonderful days.

From "uho uho" man evolved until the present day.
Combining vowels and consonants to speak of love.
I feel like nothing has changed even now.
The important thing is the feeling of thinking of someone, and a little melody after that.
There will be rainy days and windy days.
Well, not everything goes perfectly all the time, right?
That's why I'll keep talking to share it.
There's so much I want to talk to you about.
Being a crybaby or a wimp is fine too, right?
With or without you nearby, I'm under this sky.
The number of words I received from you, each one is a precious treasure.
Thinking of someone feels good, putting it into words feels good.

We are living on a spinning star.
For some reason, neighbors are living in this moment now.
Let's forget the conflicts, talk of love, and connect the circle.
There's something I want to talk to you about.
When I think about it, I'm thrilled.
With or without you nearby, these are such wonderful days.
There's so much I want to talk to you about.
Being a crybaby or a wimp is fine too, right?
With or without you nearby, I'm under this sky.
The number of words I received from you, each one is a precious treasure.
Thinking of someone feels good, putting it into words feels good.
Beyond this line!

scenes.description: A lengthy collage of fan art and written messages celebrating the 3rd anniversary of the hololive 3rd generation. Instrumental background music plays.
A static promotional image for the 'hololive 3rd generation live #きめるるん大作戦' concert.
A slide showing the sponsors of the event.
